depression.description: I often feel like my contributions at work don't matter. It's disheartening to see others get recognized while I feel invisible.
I constantly battle with the thought that I'm worthless and that my efforts are futile. It's exhausting to feel this way every day.
I've been avoiding taking on new responsibilities or commitments at work because I'm afraid of failing again. It feels safer to hold back.
I can't stop thinking about the times I missed out on sharing my ideas. It makes me feel even more isolated and frustrated.
I find myself going home early and not finishing my work because I feel so defeated. It's like I just want to escape the environment.
